title: Allen Institute for AI CEO Ali Farhadi steps down as nonprofit navigates shifting AI landscape
summary: Ali Farhadi is stepping down as the CEO of the Allen Institute for AI (Ai2), after a two-and-a-half-year tenure that brought growing recognition to the Seattle-based nonprofit research institute as a key player in the world of open source artificial intelligence. Read More

title: AI may be giving teens bad nutrition advice
summary: AI-generated meal plans for fictional teens cut an entire meal’s worth of calories and carbs while overemphasizing protein and fats, a new study reports.
